mapper.select: SELECT * FROM favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT tool_id FROM favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO favorite (id, user_id, tool_id, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{toolId}, #{createdAt})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND tool_id = #{toolId}
